task_description: Fix critical UX issues: make all design images admin-editable via EditableImage, fix Lightbox mobile freeze/back navigation, fix Contact text overflow, fix Logo wordmark gap, update About designer image, improve overall mobile friendliness, and update SUPABASE_SETUP.md with actual admin email.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes. Vite production build succeeds (3.24s). All 4 review issues from v1 have been addressed: swipe-vs-scroll conflict resolved, lazy-loading restored via loading prop, html overflow-x removed, Lightbox error fallback added for custom designs. SUPABASE_SETUP.md updated with actual admin email.
